title: TRAVELERS' HEALTH - 211info
text: CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION TRAVELERS' HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on travel vaccinations and includes a searchable map of authorized yellow fever centers. 1600 Clifton Road Atlanta, GA 30329 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (800) 232-4636 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 232-4636 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Travel Immunizations Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - NATURAL DISASTERS AND SEVERE WEATHER EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MILESTONES HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - COVID-19 NO COST TESTING INFORMATION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - FLU AND COVID-19 VACCINE FINDER HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - GET PREP PUBLIC HEALTH - CDC NATIONAL PREVENTION INFORMATION NETWORK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION
